lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਿ ਘਰਿ ਢੋਈ ਨ ਲਹੈ ਦਰਗਹ ਝੂਠੁ ਖੁਆਰੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dar ghar dtoee na lahai daragah jhootth khuaar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: In this world, you shall not find any shelter; in the world hereafter, being false, you shall suffer. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਸੁਜਾਣੁ ਨ ਭੁਲਈ ਸਚਾ ਵਡ ਕਿਰਸਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: aap sujaan na bhulee sachaa vadd kirasaan |
lines.english: The True Lord Himself knows all; He makes no mistakes. He is the Great Farmer of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਹਿਲਾ ਧਰਤੀ ਸਾਧਿ ਕੈ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੇ ਦਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: pahilaa dharatee saadh kai sach naam de daan |
lines.english: First, He prepares the ground, and then He plants the Seed of the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਉ ਜਾਣਿ ਨ ਜਾਣਈ ਕਿਆ ਤਿਸੁ ਚਜੁ ਅਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur kau jaan na jaanee kiaa tis chaj achaar |
lines.english: Some are very knowledgeable, but if they do not know the Guru, then what is the use of their lives?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਉ ਨਿਧਿ ਉਪਜੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਏਕੁ ਕਰਮਿ ਪਵੈ ਨੀਸਾਣੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: nau nidh upajai naam ek karam pavai neesaan |2|
lines.english: The nine treasures are produced from Name of the One Lord. By His Grace, we obtain His Banner and Insignia. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧੁਲੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਆ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਅੰਧ ਗੁਬਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: andhulai naam visaariaa manamukh andh gubaar |
lines.english: The blind have forgotten the Naam, the Name of the Lord. The self-willed manmukhs are in utter darkness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਣੁ ਜਾਣੁ ਨ ਚੁਕਈ ਮਰਿ ਜਨਮੈ ਹੋਇ ਖੁਆਰੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aavan jaan na chukee mar janamai hoe khuaar |3|
lines.english: Their comings and goings in reincarnation do not end; through death and rebirth, they are wasting away. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੰਦਨੁ ਮੋਲਿ ਅਣਾਇਆ ਕੁੰਗੂ ਮਾਂਗ ਸੰਧੂਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: chandan mol anaaeaa kungoo maang sandhoor |
lines.english: The bride may buy sandalwood oil and perfumes, and apply them in great quantities to her hair;

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੋਆ ਚੰਦਨੁ ਬਹੁ ਘਣਾ ਪਾਨਾ ਨਾਲਿ ਕਪੂਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: choaa chandan bahu ghanaa paanaa naal kapoor |
lines.english: she may sweeten her breath with betel leaf and camphor,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਧਨ ਕੰਤਿ ਨ ਭਾਵਈ ਤ ਸਭਿ ਅਡੰਬਰ ਕੂੜੁ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: je dhan kant na bhaavee ta sabh addanbar koorr |4|
lines.english: but if this bride is not pleasing to her Husband Lord, then all these trappings are false. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਰਸ ਭੋਗਣ ਬਾਦਿ ਹਹਿ ਸਭਿ ਸੀਗਾਰ ਵਿਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: sabh ras bhogan baad heh sabh seegaar vikaar |
lines.english: Her enjoyment of all pleasures is futile, and all her decorations are corrupt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਲਗੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਨ ਭੇਦੀਐ ਕਿਉ ਸੋਹੈ ਗੁਰਦੁਆਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: jab lag sabad na bhedeeai kiau sohai guraduaar |
lines.english: Until she has been pierced through with the Shabad, how can she look beautiful at Guru's Gate?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਧੰਨੁ ਸੁਹਾਗਣੀ ਜਿਨ ਸਹ ਨਾਲਿ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥੫॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: naanak dhan suhaaganee jin seh naal piaar |5|13|
lines.english: O Nanak, blessed is that fortunate bride, who is in love with her Husband Lord. ||5||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁੰਞੀ ਦੇਹ ਡਰਾਵਣੀ ਜਾ ਜੀਉ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sunyee deh ddaraavanee jaa jeeo vichahu jaae |
lines.english: The empty body is dreadful, when the soul goes out from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚੇ ਰੁੰਨੇ ਦੁਖਿ ਭਰੇ ਬਿਨਸੇ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: panche rune dukh bhare binase doojai bhaae |1|
lines.english: The five relatives (the senses) weep and wail painfully, and waste away through the love of duality. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੂੜੇ ਰਾਮੁ ਜਪਹੁ ਗੁਣ ਸਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: moorre raam japahu gun saar |
lines.english: You fool: chant the Name of the Lord, and preserve your virtue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਹਿ ਬਲੰਦੀ ਵਿਝਵੀ ਧੂਉ ਨ ਨਿਕਸਿਓ ਕਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhaeh balandee vijhavee dhooau na nikasio kaae |
lines.english: The burning fire of life is extinguished, and the smoke of the breath no longer emerges.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਆ ਦੂਜੀ ਕਾਰੈ ਲਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: jinee naam visaariaa doojee kaarai lag |
lines.english: Those who have forgotten the Naam, the Name of the Lord, are attached to affairs of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮਮਤਾ ਮੋਹਣੀ ਸਭ ਮੁਠੀ ਅਹੰਕਾਰਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: haumai mamataa mohanee sabh mutthee ahankaar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Egotism and possessiveness are very enticing; egotistical pride has plundered everyone. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਬਿਧਾ ਲਾਗੇ ਪਚਿ ਮੁਏ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਅਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: dubidhaa laage pach mue antar trisanaa ag |
lines.english: Attached to duality, they putrefy and die; they are filled with the fire of desire within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਰਾਖੇ ਸੇ ਉਬਰੇ ਹੋਰਿ ਮੁਠੀ ਧੰਧੈ ਠਗਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur raakhe se ubare hor mutthee dhandhai tthag |2|
lines.english: Those who are protected by the Guru are saved; all others are cheated and plundered by deceitful worldly affairs. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਧਾ ਥਕਾ ਹਉ ਮੁਈ ਮਮਤਾ ਮਾਇਆ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ॥
lines.translit: dhandhaa thakaa hau muee mamataa maaeaa krodh |
lines.english: Entanglements end, and egotism dies, along with attachment to Maya, possessiveness and anger.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਸਚੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਦਾ ਨਿਰੋਧੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: karam milai sach paaeeai guramukh sadaa nirodh |3|
lines.english: Those who receive His Mercy obtain the True One. The Gurmukhs dwell forever in balanced restraint. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਈ ਪਰੀਤਿ ਪਿਆਰੁ ਗਇਆ ਮੁਆ ਵੈਰੁ ਵਿਰੋਧੁ ॥
lines.translit: muee pareet piaar geaa muaa vair virodh |
lines.english: Love dies, and affection vanishes. Hatred and alienation die.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੀ ਕਾਰੈ ਸਚੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਪਲੈ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sachee kaarai sach milai guramat palai paae |
lines.english: By true actions, the True Lord is met, and the Guru's Teachings are found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਨਰੁ ਜੰਮੈ ਨਾ ਮਰੈ ਨਾ ਆਵੈ ਨਾ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: so nar jamai naa marai naa aavai naa jaae |
lines.english: Then, they are not subject to birth and death; they do not come and go in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦਰਿ ਪਰਧਾਨੁ ਸੋ ਦਰਗਹਿ ਪੈਧਾ ਜਾਇ ॥੪॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: naanak dar paradhaan so darageh paidhaa jaae |4|14|
lines.english: O Nanak, they are respected at the Lord's Gate; they are robed in honor in the Court of the Lord. ||4||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mehal 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਜਲਿ ਬਲਿ ਮਾਟੀ ਭਇਆ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹਿ ਮਨੂਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: tan jal bal maattee bheaa man maaeaa mohi manoor |
lines.english: The body is burnt to ashes; by its love of Maya, the mind is rusted through.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਉਗਣ ਫਿਰਿ ਲਾਗੂ ਭਏ ਕੂਰਿ ਵਜਾਵੈ ਤੂਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: aaugan fir laagoo bhe koor vajaavai toor |
lines.english: Demerits become one's enemies, and falsehood blows the bugle of attack.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਭਰਮਾਈਐ ਦੁਬਿਧਾ ਡੋਬੇ ਪੂਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bin sabadai bharamaaeeai dubidhaa ddobe poor |1|
lines.english: Without the Word of the Shabad, people wander lost in reincarnation. Through the love of duality, multitudes have been drowned. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਬੂਝਿਆ ਮਰਿ ਜਨਮੈ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jin guramukh naam na boojhiaa mar janamai aavai jaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Those who do not become Gurmukh do not understand the Naam; they die, and continue coming and going in reincarnation. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਰੇ ਸਬਦਿ ਤਰਹੁ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man re sabad tarahu chit laae |
lines.english: O mind, swim across, by focusing your consciousness on the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਸੂਚਾ ਸੋ ਆਖੀਐ ਜਿਸੁ ਮਹਿ ਸਾਚਾ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tan soochaa so aakheeai jis meh saachaa naau |
lines.english: That body is said to be pure, in which the True Name abides.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੀ ਨਦਰਿ ਨਿਹਾਲੀਐ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਪਾਵੈ ਤਾਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sachee nadar nihaaleeai bahurr na paavai taau |2|
lines.english: is brought to ecstasy by the True Lord's Glance of Grace. That person does not have to go through the fire of the womb again. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਸਚਿ ਰਾਤੀ ਦੇਹੁਰੀ ਜਿਹਵਾ ਸਚੁ ਸੁਆਉ ॥
lines.translit: bhai sach raatee dehuree jihavaa sach suaau |
lines.english: One whose body is imbued with the Fear of the True One, and whose tongue savors Truthfulness,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲ ਤੇ ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣੁ ਸਾਜਿਆ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਸਮੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jal te tribhavan saajiaa ghatt ghatt jot samoe |
lines.english: From water, He created the three worlds; in each and every heart He has infused His Light.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੇ ਤੇ ਪਵਨਾ ਭਇਆ ਪਵਨੈ ਤੇ ਜਲੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: saache te pavanaa bheaa pavanai te jal hoe |
lines.english: From the True Lord came the air, and from the air came water.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਸਾਚਿ ਸੰਤੋਖਿਆ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: eihu man saach santokhiaa nadar kare tis maeh |
lines.english: One whose mind is contented with Truthfulness, is blessed with the Lord's Glance of Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਮੈਲਾ ਨਾ ਥੀਐ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਤੇ ਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: niramal mailaa naa theeai sabad rate pat hoe |3|
lines.english: The Immaculate Lord does not become polluted. Attuned to the Shabad, honor is obtained. ||3||
